text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* I failed to win the Classic Triple Crown. But
things have changed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My initial goal races for my senior year will be the
spring Tenno Sho and Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe Parcae's previous calculations for
my senior year are applicable any longer. I'll have
to recalculate my target values.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My next goal for this year is the Japan Cup. By
Parcae's prediction, I will suffer a crushing defeat.
